name: PacifiCorp
summary: PacifiCorp operates as an energy company that generates power from hydro, wind, natural gas, coal, solar, and geothermal resources. PacifiCorp was formerly known as PC/UP&L Merging Corp. and changed its name to PacifiCorp in January 1989. The company was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Portland, Oregon. PacifiCorp operates as a subsidiary of PPW Holdings LLC.
